quality.completeness: High - Contains all necessary fields for a magic item.
quality.readability: Good - Description is detailed and mechanically clear.
quality.flavor: Good - The mechanics directly support the name 'Sword of Wounding'.

mechanics.core_function: Applies a persistent necrotic damage effect on hit, stacking up to a certain point, which the target can attempt to save against or be healed via Medicine check.
removal_methods: Successful DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the start of the target's turn.
Successful DC 15 Wisdom (Medicine) check made as an action by the target or an adjacent creature.
mechanics.damage_scaling: Damage scales based on the number of successful wounds (1d4 per wound).
mechanics.restriction: Hit points lost to this weapon's damage cannot be regained via regeneration or most magic, only through short/long rest.

analysis.notes: The restriction on regaining hit points is a significant anti-healing component that pairs well with the ongoing damage mechanic.
